The instructions: readiness_state can be not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit. Since we have evidence (the constant definition is visible), we could set "evidence_acquired". Let's do that.

acquired_fact_ids: maybe we can list the fact id we just collapsed? Not needed. Provide empty array [].
